output: Executed batch 3 task T3. Wired `useActiveTaskClips` into `TimelineEditor` and added the clip-overlay spinner path in `ClipAction` with spinner priority over the stale badge.
deviations: Did not write `.megaplan/plans/show-in-progress-spinners-on-20260406-0925/execution_batch_3.json` because the target path was not writable.
Advisory audit finding: Git status shows changed files not claimed by any task: .megaplan/debt.json, .megaplan/plans/show-in-progress-spinners-on-20260406-0925
Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC4 is missing an executor acknowledgment.

task_updates.executor_notes: `TimelineEditor` now reads `activeTaskAssetKeys` from `useActiveTaskClips` (`src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx:218`) and computes/passes `isTaskActive` inside `getActionRender` (`src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx:411-457`), with `activeTaskAssetKeys` added to the callback dependency list (`src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx:459-480`). `ClipAction` now accepts `isTaskActive` (`src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.tsx:18-48`), renders a spinner badge in the stale-badge position and only falls back to the stale badge when no task is active (`src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.tsx:352-372`), and includes `isTaskActive` in `areClipActionPropsEqual` (`src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.tsx:406-448`). Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.tsx`, `git diff --check -- src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.tsx`, and `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` all passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The render path is now mutually exclusive: `ClipAction` shows `isTaskActive ? <spinner> : isVariantStale ? <stale badge> : null`, so a stale badge is not rendered when a task is active (`src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.tsx:352-372`). `isTaskActive` is also included in `areClipActionPropsEqual` (`src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.tsx:414`), so memoized clips update correctly when task activity changes.
